title: Claim your stay
welcomeDesc: Verify your booking with a quick OTP sent to the phone number on your reservation. Once verified, we'll open your in-room menu and services.
step1Desc: Enter your booking code and the phone number used for your reservation.
step2Desc: Type the 6-digit code we send to your phone and access your stay.
secureDesc: Your details are used only to confirm your stay and unlock the VAiyu guest menu.

demoHint.pre: Demo mode is ON. Use booking code

otpSent: We've sent a one-time code to your phone.

validation.invalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number (8–15 digits).
